description: Claimed 10-15s per {1,k} pair at 10^10 on a single B200 is inconsistent with hardware capabilities. Even idealized kernel performing one modular inversion per 3 GPU cycles would need >10 minutes for 10^10 inputs. Published benchmarks (Berkel & Fassler 2023) show 10^9 checks in 30s on 8xA100.
